csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Copié à partir de la référence
Copié à partir de la référence
Copié à partir de la référence

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Ruta de ID De tipo Flex
Ruta de ID De tipo Flex
Ruta de ID De tipo Flex

csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Unité utilisée dans la nomenclature (ex. : cm)
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Unidad utilizada en LDM (por ejemplo, cm)
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: BOM で使用する単位 (例: yd)
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Unità usata nella distinta base (ad esempio iarda)
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: BOM 测量单位 (例如: 码)

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Saisissez l'unité de mesure à utiliser dans la nomenclature. Cette unité de mesure doit être celle utilisée pour le calcul du prix de nomenclature (144 boutons par grosse).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Geben Sie die Maßeinheit ein, die in der Stückliste verwendet werden soll. Diese Maßeinheit sollte mit der für die Kalkulation des Preises in der Stückliste verwendeten Einheit identisch sein (144 Knöpfe brutto).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Introduzca la unidad de medida que desea utilizar en la LDM. Debería ser la unidad de medida utilizada también para el cálculo del precio de la LDM (grupo de 144 botones).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: BOM で使用する測定単位を入力します。この測定単位は BOM 価格 の計算にも使用します (ボタン 1 グロスが 144 個など)。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Immettere l'unità di misura da utilizzare nella distinta base. Deve corrispondere all'unità usata per il calcolo del prezzo della distinta base (144 bottoni per grossa).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 请输入要在 BOM 中使用的测量单位。此单位应为 BOM 价格（每罗 144 钮）计算中使用的测量单位。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: Saisissez l'unité de mesure à utiliser dans la nomenclature. Cette unité de mesure doit être celle utilisée pour le calcul du prix de nomenclature (144 boutons par grosse).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Geben Sie die Maßeinheit ein, die in der Stückliste verwendet werden soll. Diese Maßeinheit sollte mit der für die Kalkulation des Preises in der Stückliste verwendeten Einheit identisch sein (144 Knöpfe brutto).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Introduzca la unidad de medida que desea utilizar en la LDM. Debería ser la unidad de medida utilizada también para el cálculo del precio de la LDM (grupo de 144 botones).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: BOM で使用する測定単位を入力します。この測定単位は BOM 価格 の計算にも使用します (ボタン 1 グロスが 144 個など)。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Immettere l'unità di misura da utilizzare nella distinta base. Deve corrispondere all'unità usata per il calcolo del prezzo della distinta base (144 bottoni per grossa).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 请输入要在 BOM 中使用的测量单位。此单位应为 BOM 价格（每罗 144 钮）计算中使用的测量单位。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Enter the unit of measure that you would want used in the BOM. This should be the unit of measure also used for the calculation of BOM Price (144 buttons per gross).

DATA|java.lang.Boolean|false , DATA|java.lang.String|piece , DATA|java.lang.String|each , DATA|java.lang.String|sfpair , DATA|java.lang.String|dozen , DATA|java.lang.String|gross

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Cradle to Cradle Certification Date Certificate Uploaded
Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS) Date Certificate Uploaded
Global Recycled Standard (GRS) Date Certificate Uploaded
Organic Content Standard (OCS) Date Certificate Uploaded
Programme for the Endorsement of Forest Certification (PEFC)

csvBeginConstraintDefView.csvruleData: DATA|java.lang.Boolean|false , DATA|java.lang.String|meter , DATA|java.lang.String|yard , DATA|java.lang.String|cm , DATA|java.lang.String|feet , DATA|java.lang.String|in , DATA|java.lang.String|mm
DATA|java.lang.Boolean|false , DATA|java.lang.String|piece , DATA|java.lang.String|each , DATA|java.lang.String|sfpair , DATA|java.lang.String|dozen , DATA|java.lang.String|gross

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Recycled Claim Standard (RCS) Date Certificate Uploaded
Responsible Wool Standard (RWS) Date Certificate Uploaded
Used if Supplier's actual weight is different from spec, but still acceptable within tolerance
